column1: Announcement - Your curriculum in mySpark has any documents needed throughout onboarding

column6: Instructions
Log into the open meeting link in your Outlook calendar. After your meeting, in your mySpark curriculum Activate and Mark Complete the ParMed - Introduction to Promotions item.

column3: Pharma ISS - Schedule Side by Sides
column6: No meeting during this Self-paced time. Schedule your side by sides for the week three with your assigned mentor in Outlook, please ensure that your direct manager is on the invite as optional. If your mentor declines any of them reach out to your management team to schedule with another rep from your sites mentor bench. IF you and another new hire are doubled up with a mentor please work together to schedule ONE meeting per side by side. Once you have scheduled your side by sides go In your mySpark curriculum to Active and mark complete the Pharma ISS - Schedule Side by Sides item.
Lunch

Log into the open meeting link in your Outlook calendar. Reference your standard role play rubric you saved earlier in onboarding. After your meeting, in your mySpark curriculum Activate and Mark Complete the ParMed - Objection Handling Role Play item.
Break

column3:
Side-by-side Guide for New Hires #10 - Action Learning
Topic: promotions
column6: Log into the open meeting link in your Outlook calendar you scheduled with your mentor or peer. In your mySpark curriculum launch, download, save and fill in your Side-by-side Guide for New Hires #10 - Action Learning. Once your side by side is complete return to mySpark and mark complete your die by side. After marking complete, take the post-test, which is copying your answers/notes from the guide you downloaded and saved into the corresponding questions in mySpark. Hit Submit Final Answers once your have answered all the questions.
Break

column3: ParMed - Promo Practice Role Play Rubric
column6: Log into the open meeting link in your Outlook calendar. In your mySpark curriculum launch the ParMed - Promo Practice Role Play Rubric. Save it to your computer to use reference during this role play. After the meeting return to mySpark and mark it as complete.
Use this time to catch upon any in progress mySpark items, review learning materials, practice pronunciations, or complete outstanding tasks.
